idempotency.rule: GET existing custom fields + tags; REUSE any matching zhc_ key/name; only CREATE the remainder. Never duplicate.

workflow.note: Built AFTER the form exists (needs the form id). Skill 44 PLAN-MODE + QC gate (WF-1..21, rubric >= 8.5) applies.

hidden_field_alt.how: Add the built-in Tags object-field as a HIDDEN field with a preset value; submission writes the tag to the contact.
hidden_field_alt.when: Only if no workflow is desired; workflow is preferred/testable.

note: Skill 44 creates/looks-up these on the location BEFORE the browser build. The browser then only DRAGS the pre-created zhc_ fields in via Add Object Fields. Custom-field create-on-the-fly is DISALLOWED.
